Features.title: Our Services
Features.subtitle: From hardware MVP validation to AI model training — everything you need to build and grow in the AI era, all in one place.
Features.zeroInfra_desc: Hosted on Cloudflare's global edge network, completely free for small and medium traffic. No server ops, no annual renewals — operational costs drop to near zero.
Features.ecosystem_desc: ESP32-based prototyping without custom PCBs. Deliver a functional prototype in 15–20 business days and validate your hardware idea at minimal cost.
Features.techStack_desc: Neural network model training powered by synthetic data technology. Build vertical AI for your specific use case — no massive labelled dataset required to get started.
Features.ai_desc: AI customer service built on your own knowledge base. Automatically answers visitor inquiries 24/7, boosts conversions around the clock, and dramatically reduces support costs.
Features.web3_desc: X402 protocol integration lets AI Agents autonomously pay for API calls and services via on-chain stablecoins (USDC etc.) — stake your position in the AI Agent economy now.
Features.ux_desc: Standard support for EN / ZH / JA / KO with language-level routing and independent SEO. Enter global markets without rebuilding — adding new languages requires no core refactoring.

Hero.description: Turn your idea into a shippable product — at a fraction of the cost.
Hero.featuresBottomText: MOTA also offers enterprise site-building and scale production services — from prototype to global market, every step of the way.
Hero.openSourceDesc: MOTA ATOM is open source and powered by open source software. The code is available on GitHub.

AboutPage.metadataDescription: We are building the future of SaaS asset management.
AboutPage.subtitle: We are on a mission to simplify the chaos of digital asset management through intelligent, GenAI-first solutions.
AboutPage.storyParagraph1: It started with a simple observation: managing SaaS assets and computer vision datasets was becoming impossibly complex. Traditional tools were clunky, slow, and disconnected.
AboutPage.storyParagraph2: We realized that Generative AI wasn't just a buzzword—it was the key to unlocking a new workflow. By generating data instead of just collecting it, we could speed up development cycles by 10x.
AboutPage.storyParagraph3: Today, MOTA ATOM helps thousands of developers and companies structure their chaos and build faster.
